1.title: Challenge Red-01: Network Port Scan Recon
1.desc: The adversary has launched an initial scan targeting Substation Alpha. Check the threat warning or network details. Identify the target IP address of Substation Alpha to establish connection details.
1.hint: Look at the Attacker Terminal's header line '[+] TARGET SCOPE: 192.168.x.x' or check the live logs.

2.title: Challenge Red-02: PLC Breaker Override Exploit
2.desc: The attacker has pivoted into the OT network. They are running a Metasploit module to write registry coils. Identify the Modbus register coil address tripped to shut down the power grid.
2.hint: Check the exploit description or the attacker script. Look for a 5-digit number beginning with 4.

3.title: Challenge Blue-03: VLAN Containment & Isolation
3.desc: A critical breach is active! We must trigger an incident response to quarantine the attacker. Find the VLAN identifier that has been isolated to contain the threat.
3.hint: Look at the terminal logs or check the telemetry grid's quarantined network link. The isolated VLAN is labeled starting with VLAN_.

1.title: Challenge Red-04: API Endpoint Discovery
1.desc: The attacker is scanning the web services interface of the Metro Transit platform. Identify the scanning tool name used to discover unauthenticated REST API endpoints.
1.hint: Review the live SIEM event logs or the attacker terminal scan. It is a well-known vulnerability scanner.

2.title: Challenge Red-05: Signal Hijack Command Injection
2.desc: The attacker found a vulnerable API. They are sending unauthorized payload overrides. Identify the vulnerable endpoint base path (URL path) being targeted.
2.hint: Look at the attacker command `/api/v1/signal` or the live web server access logs.

3.title: Challenge Blue-06: VPN Certificate Revocation
3.desc: The signal hijack is underway. Security teams are rotating keys and revoking compromised tokens. What is the firewall certification status keyword applied to the attacker session?
3.hint: Check the terminal feedback in Phase 3 or the SIEM dashboard status indicators. It is in all caps: REVOKED.

1.title: Challenge Red-07: ER SMB Vulnerability Scan
1.desc: The attacker is scanning hospital systems for legacy file-sharing ports. Identify the Microsoft security bulletin identifier or CVE ID of the EternalBlue SMB vulnerability exploited.

2.title: Challenge Red-08: Cryptolocker Ransomware Extension
2.desc: Ransomware payload is active. Hospital database files are locked. What is the extension appended to the encrypted telemetry files?
2.hint: Check the ransomware alerts in Panel 3 or the attacker CLI feedback. Look for the file extension name (starting with a dot).

3.title: Challenge Blue-09: Golden Image Firmware Recovery
3.desc: Incident response is restoring backup systems. Find the recovery target profile name used to re-flash compromised consoles.
3.hint: Check the restoration logs. Look for the two-word identifier starting with GOLDEN_.
